--Q1. What is the total revenue

--Q2. What is the total revenue generated by male vs. female customers?

--Q3. What is the total revenue generated by different age_group customers?

--Q4. What is the total revenue generated by different age_group and gender customers?

--Q5. Which customers used a discount but still spent more than the average purchase amount? 

-- Q6. Which are the top 5 products with the highest average review rating?

--Q7. Compare the average Purchase Amounts between Standard and Express Shipping. 

--Q8. Do subscribed customers spend more? Compare average spend and total revenue between subscribers and non-subscribers.

--Q9. Segment customers into New, Returning, and Loyal based on their total number of previous purchases, and show the count of each segment.

--Q10. What are the top 3 most purchased products within each category? 

--Q11. Are customers who are repeat buyers (more than 5 previous purchases) also likely to subscribe?

--Q12. What is the revenue contribution of each age group?
